case_title: CALIBRE ONE, INC VS. VIRTUALLOGIX,INC et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIBRE ONE, INC SERVED MAR-02-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIRTUALLOGIX,INC
